summary: Navigation testing across multiple forum categories and discovery of events page from the homepage

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Customer experience forum card successfully navigates to the sales customer experience forum page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the "Customer experience | Sales, Customer Insights, CRM" forum card
validations: The page displays the Customer experience forum page header
The page shows forum discussion threads related to Sales, Customer Insights, and CRM

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Small and medium business forum card successfully navigates to the business central forum page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Navigate back using the browser back button
Click the "Small and medium business | Business Central, NAV, RMS" forum card
validations: The page displays the Small and medium business forum page header
The page shows forum discussion threads related to Business Central, NAV, and RMS

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Supply chain forum card successfully navigates to the supply chain forum page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Navigate back using the browser back button
Click the "Supply chain | Supply Chain Management, Commerce" forum card
validations: The page displays the Supply chain forum page header
The page shows forum discussion threads related to Supply Chain Management and Commerce

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Discover events navigation menu item successfully navigates to the blogs page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Navigate back using the browser back button
Click the "Discover events" navigation menu item
validations: The page displays the Community blogs page header
The page shows a list of blog posts and community content

summary: Navigation testing from the sales customer experience forum page to homepage and blogs page

content.objective: Verify that navigating to the Customer experience forum page from the homepage is successful.
actions: Click the "Customer experience | Sales, Customer Insights, CRM" forum card

summary: Navigation testing from the business central forum page to homepage and blogs page

content.objective: Verify that navigating to the Small and medium business forum page from the homepage is successful.
actions: Click the "Small and medium business | Business Central, NAV, RMS" forum card

summary: Navigation testing from the supply chain forum page to homepage and blogs page

content.objective: Verify that navigating to the Supply chain forum page from the homepage is successful.
actions: Click the "Supply chain | Supply Chain Management, Commerce" forum card

summary: Navigation testing from the blogs page to homepage using both main navigation and breadcrumb navigation

content.objective: Verify that navigating to the blogs page from the homepage is successful.
actions: Click the "Discover events" navigation menu item

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Dynamics 365 Community navigation menu item from the blogs page successfully navigates back to the homepage, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the "Discover events" navigation menu item
Click the "Dynamics 365 Community" navigation menu item
validations: The page displays the homepage with the main hero banner
The page shows the "Explore Dynamics 365 forums" section with forum cards
normalization_notes: The Dynamics 365 Community navigation action is defined from the blogs page.

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Dynamics 365 Community breadcrumb link from the blogs page successfully navigates back to the homepage, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the "Discover events" navigation menu item
validations: The page displays the homepage with the main hero banner
The page shows the "Explore Dynamics 365 forums" section with forum cards
normalization_notes: The breadcrumb link is only visible on the blogs page; browser:back would reset an independent case to homepage.
